V025-N00146.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V025-N00146.label: 头风病
V025-N00146.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病
V025-N00146.definition: 泛指因风邪或夹带寒、热、暑、湿等邪侵袭，或情志变动，肝阳化风,风痰上扰清空，脉络拘急或失养而引起的反复发作性头痛等为特征的一类疾病。

V025-N00146.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V025-N00146.label: 头风
V025-N00146.definition: 头痛病经久不愈，以头痛部位不定,作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。

V025-N00146.label: 头风
V025-N00146.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V025-N00146.definition: 头痛病经久不愈者。以其痛作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。

V025-N00146.label: 头风
V025-N00146.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病

V025-N00146.path: 传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病类｜头痛

V025-N00146.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V025-N00146.label: 头风病
V025-N00146.aliases: 头风； 头痛病； Head wind disorder； Headache
V025-N00146.pinyinNames: tou feng bing; tóu fēng bìng
V025-N00146.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V025-N00146.definition: Characterized by chronic, recurrent headache with no fixed positions. Contributing factors may include external contraction of wind heat, wind cold or summer heat and dampness, hyperactive liver yang transforming into wind, or wind phlegm disturbing the mind. This condition is subcategorized into migraine, parietal headache or thunderclap headache.

V025-N00405.definition: 因产后气血运行不畅，子宫收缩所致。临床以产妇在产褥期，发生与分娩有关的小腹疼痛为特征的产后病。

V025-N00405.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V025-N00405.label: 产后腹痛
V025-N00405.definition: 以产妇在产褥期发生与分娩有关的小腹疼痛为特征的产后病。

V025-N00405.label: 产后腹痛
V025-N00405.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V025-N00405.definition: 又称"儿枕痛”。以产妇分娩后，小腹疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V025-N00405.label: 产后腹痛
V025-N00405.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜产后病
V025-N00405.definition: 以产妇分娩后，小腹疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V025-N00456.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V025-N00456.label: 少阴病
V025-N00456.path: 外感病类术语｜伤寒类病
V025-N00456.definition: 因寒邪直中少阴，或由三阳病误治传变，随其阳虚或阴虚而有寒化、热化之变所致。临床以脉微细，嗜睡、神昧，或伴见四肢逆冷，烦躁不得卧等为特征的伤寒病。

V025-N00456.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V025-N00456.label: 少阴病
V025-N00456.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜伤寒
V025-N00456.definition: 伤寒病变后期,邪入于少阴心肾，正气严重虚衰,全身性阴阳衰惫，以脉微细，但欲寐等为特征的伤寒。

V025-N00456.label: 少阴病
V025-N00456.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜伤寒类病

V025-N00456.label: 少阴病证
V025-N00456.englishNames: Middle yin stage Pattern (TM), Middle yin stage pattern; lesser yin disease pattern/syndrome

V025-N00456.label: 少阴病证
V025-N00456.aliases: Lesser yin pattern； Middle yin stage pattern； 少阴病
V025-N00456.englishNames: Shaoyin pattern; Middle yin stage Pattern (TM), Middle yin stage pattern; lesser yin disease pattern/syndrome
V025-N00456.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V025-N00456.definition: Characterized by manifestations of Shaoyin cold transformation pattern and Shaoyin heat transformation. This pattern often results from hypofunction of the heart and kidney as well as general deficiency of yin and yang.

V025-N00456.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V025-N00456.label: 少阴病证
V025-N00456.definition: a pattern/syndrome occurring at the late stage of an externally contracted disease, marked by deficiency cold of the heart and kidney, and manifested by aversion to cold, listlessness, irritable disposition, insomnia, cold limbs, diarrhea with undiges

V025-N00454.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V025-N00454.label: 少阳病
V025-N00454.path: 外感病类术语｜伤寒类病
V025-N00454.definition: 因气血虚弱,外邪与正气相搏于少阳所致。临床以往来寒热，口苦、咽干等为特征的伤寒病。

V025-N00454.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V025-N00454.label: 少阳病
V025-N00454.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜伤寒
V025-N00454.definition: 邪犯少阳，枢机不运,经气不利，以往来寒热，胸胁苦满，口苦,咽干，目眩，脉弦等为特征的伤寒。5.7.4

V025-N00454.label: 少阳病
V025-N00454.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜伤寒类病

V025-N00454.label: 少阳病证
V025-N00454.englishNames: Late yang stage pattern; lesser yang disease pattern/syndrome

V025-N00454.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V025-N00454.label: 少阳病证
V025-N00454.aliases: Late yang stage pattern； Lesser yang pattern； 少阳病
V025-N00454.englishNames: Late yang stage pattern; Shaoyang pattern; lesser yang disease pattern/syndrome
V025-N00454.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V025-N00454.definition: Characterized by a bitter mouth, a dry throat, dizziness, blurred vision, fever alternating with aversion to cold, fullness in the chest and subcostal region, no desire to eat or drink, restlessness, and vomiting. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic factors affect the qi flow of Shaoyang meridians.

V025-N00454.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V025-N00454.label: 少阳病证
V025-N00454.definition: a pattern/syndrome in which the pathogen exists between the exterior and interior of the body, marked by alternate fever and chills, fullness and choking feeling in the chest and hypochondriac region, dry throat and string-like pulse, also called the

V025-N00453.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V025-N00453.label: 阳明病
V025-N00453.path: 外感病类术语｜伤寒类病
V025-N00453.definition: 因太阳表邪入里化热，或因少阳病失治，或因素体阳盛,邪热搏结于阳明所致。临床以高热不已、汗出不退、烦渴引饮、脉洪大等阳明邪热独盛，或日哺潮热、脐腹胀痛、大便秘结等邪与燥屎内结，甚或神昏、谵语为特征的伤寒病。

V025-N00453.label: 阳明病
V025-N00453.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜伤寒类病

V025-N00453.label: 阳明病证

V025-N00453.aliases: 阳明病； Middle yang stage pattern； Yang brightness pattern
V025-N00453.englishNames: yang brightness disease pattern/ syndrome; Middle yang stage pattern; Yangming disorders
V025-N00453.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V025-N00453.definition: A group of disorders caused by hyperactive yang heat in Yangming meridians or fu organs.

V025-N00453.label: 阳明病证
V025-N00453.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by exuberant yang and dryness-heat in the stomach and intestines occurring in the course of an externally contracted disease, manifested by abdominal distention with constipation, tidal fever and deep and replete pulse, also

V025-N00457.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V025-N00457.label: 厥阴病
V025-N00457.path: 外感病类术语｜伤寒类病
V025-N00457.definition: 因寒热诸邪直中厥阴,或由三阳病误治传变所致。临床以四肢厥冷，或厥热交作,或伴见消渴,气上撞心，心中疼热，饥而不欲食，吐蛔等为特征的伤寒病。

V025-N00457.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V025-N00457.label: 厥阴病
V025-N00457.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜伤寒
V025-N00457.definition: 外感病中,寒热病邪夹杂，机体阳衰阴耗，以四肢厥冷，或厥与热交替，或寒热夹杂，脉无定体等为特征的重症伤寒。

V025-N00457.label: 厥阴病
V025-N00457.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜伤寒类病

V025-N00457.label: 厥阴病证
V025-N00457.englishNames: reverting yin disease pattern/syndrome; Late Yin stage Patterns

V025-N00457.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V025-N00457.label: 厥阴病证
V025-N00457.aliases: 厥阴病； Late Yin stage Pattern； Reverting yin pattern
V025-N00457.englishNames: reverting yin disease pattern/syndrome; Late Yin stage Patterns; Jueyin pattern
V025-N00457.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V025-N00457.definition: Characterized by wasting, extreme thirst, qi surging up to the heart, pain and feverish sensation in the heart, hunger but no desire to eat food and vomiting of roundworm after eating. This pattern often occurs in the advanced stage of six meridian transmission and manifests as extreme heat or cold, or alternating cold and heat.

V025-N00457.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V025-N00457.label: 厥阴病证
V025-N00457.definition: a pattern/syndrome occurring at the latest stage of three yin disease characterized by interweaving of cold and heat or yin and yang in a critically ill case, also called the reverting yin disease

V025-N00455.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V025-N00455.label: 太阴病
V025-N00455.path: 外感病类术语｜伤寒类病
V025-N00455.definition: 因寒邪直中太阴，或由三阳病误治传变所致。临床以腹满、腹痛，下利，呕吐，不欲饮食，口不渴等为特征的伤寒病。

V025-N00455.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V025-N00455.label: 太阴病
V025-N00455.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜伤寒
V025-N00455.definition: 外感风寒,脾阳虚衰,寒湿中阻，以腹满而吐，纳呆，自利，口不渴,时腹自痛，脉沉缓或弱等为特征的伤寒。

V025-N00455.label: 太阴病
V025-N00455.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜伤寒类病

V025-N00455.aliases: Early yang stage pattern； Greater yang pattern； 太阴病； 太阳病
V025-N00455.englishNames: Early yang stage pattern; Taiyang pattern; greater yin disease pattern/syndrome; greater yang disease pattern/syndrome
V025-N00455.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V025-N00455.definition: Characterized by manifestations of Taiyang meridian pattern and Taiyang–fu organ pattern. This pattern often occurs when the struggle between anti-pathogenic qi and pathogenic factors affects the normal functioning of the Wei-defence and Ying nutrients.

V025-N00455.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V025-N00455.label: 太阳病证
V025-N00455.definition: a pattern/syndrome characterized by decline of spleen yang with production of cold-dampness, and manifested by anorexia, vomiting, abdominal fullness and dull pain, diarrhea and weak pulse, also called the greater yin disease

V025-N00452.label: 太阳病
V025-N00452.path: 外感病类术语｜伤寒类病
V025-N00452.definition: 因风寒等外邪侵袭太阳，营卫不和，或经腑气机不利所致。临床以发热、恶寒，或微恶风寒，头项强痛，脉浮等初起征象为特征的伤寒病。

V025-N00138.label: 疟母

V025-N00138.definition: 因疟疾反复不愈，邪与气血相搏,痰瘀结于胁下所致。临床以胁下痞块，胀痛不舒，面色晦暗，舌有瘀象等为特征的疟疾。

V025-N00138.definition: 以疟疾反复发作，终年不愈，胁下结成痞块，胀痛不舒，面色晦暗，舌见瘀斑，脉弦涩等为特征的疟疾。

V025-N00138.label: 疟母
